media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Baron Afanas
characters.description: Baron AfanasOriginalBurntRejuvenatedAlso Known AsAlias(es)The Undying One[1]Biographical InformationStatusUndeadTurned byUnknown (PossiblyGoëjlrm)AgeBorn c. 1066 A.D~957 years oldSpeciesVampireGenderMalePortrayed ByActorDoug JonesImagesBaron Afanasis a fearsome member ofvampireroyalty, and a recurring figure inWhat We Do in the Shadows(TV series). Afanas was avampiresupremacist who firmly believed vampires should overpower thehumanpopulation, an opinion that divided many other vampires.[2]Unlike most vampires, he has a more monstrous appearance, possibly due to his age. The name "Afanas" is a latin transcription of an Eastern Slavic name, which derived from a Greek name "Ἀθανάσιος" (lat. "Athanasios") and means "Undying". According toLaszlo Cravensworth, it was the Baron who turnedNadjainto a vampire.[3]Afanas lacked genitals, but was still a good lover according to Laszlo and Nadja, who both had affairs with the Baron. Afanas told both vampires to take over the new world of America (or justStaten Islandor New York, they were not sure) while intimate with them, taking them both by surprise and confusion.[4] The baron is a charismatic vampire. He is loved throughout the vampire world because he can be reasoned with even though  he has more traditional views than the other “younger” vampires. He comes across as ruthless and psychotic in the first few episodes just to find out later that he has some what of a soft spot.
characters.personality_section: The baron is a charismatic vampire. He comes across as ruthless and psychotic in the first few episodes just to find out later that he has some what of a soft spot.

characters.name: Alexandr
characters.description: AlexandrBiographical InformationRelativesPetyr(relative)[1]StatusUndeadSpeciesVampireGenderMalePortrayed ByActorFergus AitkenImagesAlexandris avampireliving inWellington. He appears inWellington Paranormal. Alexandr was spotted by theWellington Police Paranormal Unitin a cemetery receiving flyers from fellowvampireNickto promote his party. When Alexandr found out that Nick’s party was going to include stolen blood bags from the hospital, he was dismayed, telling the camera crew that while drinking the blood of the living was understandable, blood bags should be reserved for those who need it.[2]
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Anton
characters.description: Anton AndersonHumanWerewolfBiographical InformationAffiliationTe Aro werewolf packRemutaka ForestStatusAliveSpeciesWerewolfGenderMalePortrayed ByActorRhys DarbyImagesAnton Anderson[1]is the leader of awerewolfpackinTe Aro. He appears inWhat We Do in the Shadows,Wellington Paranormaland is set to appear inWe're Wolves.[2] Anton’s role in the pack is to help prevent the other werewolves from transforming prematurely and ensuring they do not harm others when they inevitably transform. He does so by preventing the werewolves from becoming angry through discouraging swearing and practicing breathing exercises, among other methods. The documentary crew first encountered Anton’s pack when they passed thevampireflatmates and their human friendStu.Deacondeliberately began to agitate them and Anton had to calm the pack down and prevent them from transforming, which some of them almost did. Anton eventually helped solve the conflict in a civil manner and they left the vampires.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Anton

characters.name: Anton (Staten Island)
characters.description: AntonBiographical InformationAffiliationStaten Island Werewolf Support GroupStatusAliveSpeciesWerewolfGenderMalePortrayed ByActorDerrick BecklesImages Antonis a member of theStaten Island Werewolf Support Group. He appears inWhat We Do in the Shadows(TV series). Sometime before 2021, Anton had a fling withGail, the human on-and-off girlfriend of thevampireNandor, and turned her into awerewolf. Nandor reconnected with Gail, accepted her lycanthropy and planned on proposing to her. His roommates were less supportive when they eventually discovered she was a werewolf, but Nandor encouraged them to meet her pack again in order to overcome their prejudice.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Arjan
characters.description: ArjanHumanWerewolfBiographical InformationAffiliationStaten Island Werewolf Support GroupStatusAliveSpeciesWerewolfGenderMalePortrayed ByActorArj BarkerImages Arjanis an Indian-Americanwerewolfand leader of theStaten Island Werewolf Support Group. He appears inWhat We Do in the Shadows(TV series). WhenLaszlorealized awerewolfhad urinated on one of his topiary designs, he left a trap outside. The following night, Arjan, in werewolf form, got caught in it. He lost consciousness and thevampiresbrought him inside whileGuillermobandaged his leg. He reverted back to human form, woke up and threatened the vampires for having harmed him. He then leapt out the window.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Arjan

characters.name: Arnie
characters.description: ArnieBiographical InformationStatusAliveSpeciesHumanGenderMalePortrayed ByActorDominic CuzzocreaImagesArnieis an office worker. He appears inWhat We Do in the Shadows(TV series). Arnie was a colleague of thepsychic vampireColin Robinson, and was therefore used as a frequent source of energy. For most of the time this was tolerable, but Arnie suffered two extensive periods of excessive energy draining. The first occurred when theemotional vampireEvie Russelljoined the company; she initially competed with Colin for food but then joined forces with him when they started dating. The two both drained the office heavily until they broke up with each other.[1] The second period occurred when Colin was promoted to a management position and he gained influence over Arnie. Colin went mad with power and created a feedback loop over the whole office. He was eventually able to drain his colleagues into unconsciousness by merely acknowledging them.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: The Badabook
characters.description: The BadabookBiographical InformationRelativesSylvia (cousin)StatusUndeadSpeciesBabadookGenderMalePortrayed ByActorFrancesco AntonioImagesThe Badabook(not to be confused withThe Babadook) was a guest at the 2019Bi-Annual Vampire Orgy. He appeared inWhat We Do in the Shadows(TV series). He attended with his cousin Sylvia and metNadjafor the first time, explaining that his name was a pun on "bada bing, badabook". He left the orgy early with all the other guests afterLaszlo Cravensworthdestroyed the mood by publicly declaring his love for Nadja and inviting her to a two-person orgy upstairs.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Scott Bakula (in-universe)
characters.description: Scott BakulaAlso Known AsAlias(es)Count BakulaBiographical InformationStatusAliveAge67SpeciesHumanGenderMalePortrayed ByActorScott BakulaImages Scott Bakulais ahumanactor. He appears inWhat We Do in the Shadows. WhenNadjabecame leader of theVampiric Councilof the Eastern Seaboard of the New World, she andNandorincorrectly assumed he was avampireas they mistook him forCount Dracula. Nadja video called Bakula while he was staying in Sherman Oaks, Los Angeles, and she apologized when she realized the mistake. Bakula was very confused by the encounter.[1]
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Baron’s familiar
characters.description: Baron's familiarBiographical InformationStatusAliveSpeciesHumanGenderFemalePortrayed ByActorGloria LainoImages TheBaron’s familiaris an unnamedhumancharacter who appears inWhat We Do in the Shadows (TV series). Thefamiliarhelped shipBaron AfanastoStaten Islandin a stone coffin to meet thevampiresLaszlo,NadjaandNandor. At their residence, The Baron emerged and demanded the vampires take over the new world by the time he reawakened.[1]His familiar remained in the flat as he slept and became a source of annoyance for the vampires as she kept sneaking up on them unexpectedly, never speaking.[2]
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.actor_name: Erika Camacho(possessing Gary's daughter)Paul Yates(possessing Gary)Gabe McDonnell(possessing Gary's wife)Ralph Johnson(possessing a tramp)
characters.description: Bazu'aalAlso Known AsAlias(es)Bazu'aal of the Unholy RealmBiographical InformationStatusAliveSpeciesDemonPortrayed ByActorErika Camacho(possessing Gary's daughter)Paul Yates(possessing Gary)Gabe McDonnell(possessing Gary's wife)Ralph Johnson(possessing a tramp)ImagesBazu'aalis ademonwho has possessed a number of people aroundWellington. It claims to originate from the "Unholy Realm".  In 1885, Bazu'aal possessed a woman inWellington, performing ahumansacrifice, and was subsequently arrested by police.[1]

characters.name: Bazza
characters.description: BazzaBiographical InformationRelativesSharon(wife)Unnamed(son)Unnamed(daughter)Buzza(brother)Muzza(brother)StatusAliveSpeciesExtraterrestrial floraGenderMalePortrayed ByActorRichard DeyImagesBazzais anextraterrestrial florafarmer. He is the husband ofSharon, the father of anunnamed boyandgirl, and the brother ofBuzzaandMuzza. He appears inWellington Paranormal. Bazza was visited by OfficersMinogueandO'Leary, who asked him about an incident regarding a cow being stuck up a tree. The officers were confused to see that he had an appearance strangely similiar to adisorientated farmerthey had encountered earlier. When they asked to look around his property, Bazza "herded" them towards a field with crop circles. They told him that they'd be fine to continue on alone, but he initially kept following, before they assured him they were fine. The following morning, after otherextraterrestrial floraswere trapped in his shed, Bazza thanked Minogue and O'Leary for their work, as his family joined him.[1] The officers met Bazza again the following year when they were investigating the discovery of a corpse that looked exactly like Minogue in Hemahema. They went to Bazza's shop to buy lunch and the officers recognised him, but could not recall how they met him. Bazza described the officers as “one of the many” and told them to go to Parklands Motel to find the answers they seek. The motel turned out to be populated by dozens of floras taking the forms of O'Leary, Minogue andMaaka.[2]
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

After OfficersMinogueandO'LearydebriefedBazzafollowing their entrapment ofextraterrestrial floras, they met the girl and the rest of Bazza's family.[1]

characters.name: Ben
characters.description: BenAlso Known AsAlias(es)BenjaminBiographical InformationAffiliationWellington Police ForceStatusAliveSpeciesHumanGenderMalePortrayed ByActorBenjamin TehImagesBenjamin, better known asBen, is a member of the technological crimes division of theWellington Police Force. He appears inWellington Paranormal. In 2019, SergeantMaakaasked Ben to assist theParanormal Unitafter hundreds of outdated electronic items around Mount Victoria became sentient and merged to create multiple small and hostilerobots. They couldn’t agree on the cause of the robots, but suspected the radio communications tower at the centre of the incidents may be to blame. The two set up plans to hack the tower’s mainframe with a virus using computers from inside a nearby van. Meanwhile, the robots merged into one single humanoid ‘mobot’ primarily run fromO'Leary’s mobile phone from 2004. Feeling sorry for it, O'Leary agreed to activate an ‘update’ on the mobot’s screen and it declared its motive to erase the human race and replace it with super-intelligent robots. The mobot began to climb the tower to transmit to all available technology, but stalled halfway and fell to pieces.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Ben
characters.description: BenAlso Known AsAlias(es)BenjaminBiographical InformationAffiliationWellington Police ForceStatusAliveSpeciesHumanGenderMalePortrayed ByActorBenjamin TehImagesBenjamin, better known asBen, is a member of the technological crimes division of theWellington Police Force. characters.name: Biff
characters.description: BiffBiographical InformationStatusAliveSpeciesHumanGenderMalePortrayed ByActorRob RamsayImagesBiffis ahumancolleague ofColin Robinson. He appears inWhat We Do in the Shadows(TV series). Whenemotional vampireEvie Russellbegan working at their office, she kept pretending to fall over and told her colleagues tragic stories to make them feel sorry for her. This took away potential feeding for Colin. One day, bothpsychic vampirestried to feed off Biff at the same time. They both followed and cornered Biff to a toilet cubicle, Evie told him sad anecdotes while Colin tried to engage in dull conversation. So much of Biff's energy was consumed that he fell into a coma and was taken away by paramedics. The incident caused the two vampires to engage in a psychic battle, but then call a truce and start dating instead.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: BillAlso Known AsAlias(es)Electricity BillPower Man BillBiographical InformationAffiliationThe RevengersNaenae Neighbourhood WatchStatusAliveSpeciesHumanSuperhuman(formerly)GenderMalePortrayed ByActorEsera Tanoa'iImages Billis a formersuperhumanand a member ofThe Revengers. He appears inWellington Paranormal. Bill lives in Naenae,Wellington, working as an electrician under the business name "Electricity Bill" and is a member of the Neighbourhood Watch. In 2021, a meteorite crashed into his road while he was working on his fuse box. He received an electrical surge that left him unharmed. He later realised he had gained the power to control electricity due to the radiation coming from the meteorite. He adopted the name "Power Man Bill" and decided to join a vigilante group calledThe Revengerswith fellowsuperhumanWatch membersMollyand “Google Girl”. They used their new powers to take down petty criminals in the area.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Joe Blakes
characters.description: Joe BlakesBiographical InformationAffiliationFear FactorySpeciesShapeshifterGenderMalePortrayed ByActorVaughan SlinnImages Joe Blakesis ashapeshifterliving inWellington. He appears inWellington Paranormal. As ashapeshifter, Blakes required regular feedings on human fear to survive. In order to maintain a constant source, he took up a job as the manager ofFear Factory, a haunted house attraction in Cuba Street. While working there, he frightened some of his patrons so severely that they died of heart failure.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Wes Blankenship
characters.description: Wes BlankenshipBiographical InformationAffiliationCouncil of VampiresStatusDeceasedSpeciesVampireGenderMalePortrayed ByActorTyler AlvarezImagesWes Blankenshipwas a youngvampirefrom Queens, New York. He appears in theWhat We Do in the ShadowsTV series. Wes had a Master's degree in urban planning and led theCouncil of Vampires, a young group ofvampiresandenergy vampireswho rejected the authority of theVampiric Council. When they stopped paying their dues to the Vampiric Council of the Eastern Seaboard, they received a visit from the Council's new leadersNandorandNadja. Wes and his group refused to comply, especially as Nandor and Nadja could not agree on how to confront them. Eventually, as Nandor tried to peacefully negotiate, Nadja suddenly ripped out Wes' heart, killing him instantly as a warning to the rest of his group.[1]
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: The Briannas
characters.actor_name: Rosie Howells(Brianna A.)Neenah Dekkers-Reihana(Briannah H.)Alice May Connolly(Bree-Anna Q.)
characters.description: Brianna A.GroupAHQBiographical InformationAffiliationThe BriannasSt. Carrietta’s Girls High SchoolStatusAliveSpeciesHuman(Witch)GenderFemalePortrayed ByActorRosie Howells(Brianna A.)Neenah Dekkers-Reihana(Briannah H.)Alice May Connolly(Bree-Anna Q.)Images The Briannasare a coven of three youngwitchesattendingSt. Carrietta’s Girls High School. They appear inWellington Paranormal. The three girls (Brianna A., Briannah H. and Bree-Anna Q.) were social outcasts who were bullied by several other girls at theirschool. While working as volunteer librarians, they discovered a spellbook, Moste Potente Spells, and gained supernatural powers from it. They caused an explosion in thewitchcraftand folklore section of the library, causing several students to become injured. The Briannas used their telekinetic powers to bully girls who previously picked on them or asked “too many questions” and to shoplift potato chips from a nearby store. The three also changed their appearance by adopting identical platinum blonde haircuts.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Buzza
characters.description: BuzzaBiographical InformationRelativesMuzza(brother)Bazza(brother)Unnamed(nephew)Unnamed(niece)SpeciesExtraterrestrial floraGenderMalePortrayed ByActorRichard DeyImages Buzzais anextraterrestrial flora. He is the brother ofMuzzaandBazza, and the uncle of anunnamed boyandgirl. After OfficersMinogueandO'Learywent to search a cornfield at night, Buzza appeared, naked. He abruptly ran away, but realising that it was his field, they couldn't do anything further.[1]
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.name: Carol
characters.description: CarolBiographical InformationAffiliationThe Leather SkinsStatusDeceasedAge151SpeciesVampireGenderFemalePortrayed ByActorChristine EbadiImagesCarolis avampirewho lived in the sewers ofStaten Island. She appears in theWhat We Do in the ShadowsTV series. Carol was born in 1869[1]. She had a much more inhuman appearance than mostvampires, with bulging white eyes and porcupine-like spines, and rarely spoke. Fellow vampireSimon the Deviousfound and befriended her in theStaten Islandsewers while he plotted to gain back the cursedwitch skin hatfromLaszlo Cravensworth. Carol was recruited as a member of his gang,the Leather Skins. One night, Simon lured a passing Laszlo andNadjainto the sewers by calling out to them, and claimed that Carol andCount Rapulawere the only remaining members of the Leather Skins, the others having abandoned him. Nadja felt so sorry for him that she offhandedly invited them to their house, leading Laszlo to storm off with her. The two argued on the way home and upon arriving, they found Simon, Carol and Rapula already receiving a house tour fromNandor.
characters.media_title: What We Do in the Shadows

characters.description: CelesteBiographical InformationStatusUnknownSpeciesHumanGenderFemalePortrayed ByActorGreta LeeImages Celesteis thehumanfamiliarof thevampireHouston. She appears inWhat We Do in the Shadows(TV series). Celeste servedHouston, a 162-year oldvampirewho was turned when she was only 12 and lived in a luxury apartment.Guillermowould often help Celeste clean up corpses.
